title: Sweet & Velvety Korean Cheese Stir-fry
description: A sweet and velvety Korean cheese dish featuring shredded Monterey Jack cheese, with a touch of ferment for an energizing twist that's vegetarian-friendly.

ingredients.name: Green Onions (scallions)
ingredients.amount: 1 green onion, finely chopped, for garnish

instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the onions and garlic to the hot oil and cook until translucent, about 2 minutes.
Stir in the julienned carrots, fermented black beans, fish sauce, Korean chili powder, soy sauce, honey or brown sugar, and water. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 10 minutes until the vegetables are tender but still slightly crisp.
Fold in the shredded Monterey Jack cheese and cook for another minute until melted and fully integrated with the sauce.
Remove from heat and stir in green onions for garnish. Serve hot as a snack or light meal.
